commands.review_summary:
The PR preserves ACP `final_only` text and output-accounting state across intermediate runtime invocations, defers final text delivery to the dispatch-level turn flush, and adds projector regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +11, Tests +79. Total +90 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at the source/projector level: current main flushes and resets final-only output on each completion event, while the branch demonstrates accumulation across two invocations. The claimed WeChat-visible loss was not reproduced through the real dispatch and channel path.
